title: Conduct an ecological and cultural site inspection prior to works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct an ecological and cultural site inspection prior to works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define and confirm location and setting

pcs.text: Confirm location and proposed activities/works with supervisor, plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location and proposed activities/works with supervisor, plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location and proposed activities/works with supervisor, plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify legislation, regulations and agreements that affect aspects of the location and planned work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify legislation, regulations and agreements that affect aspects of the location and planned work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify legislation, regulations and agreements that affect aspects of the location and planned work.

pcs.text: Identify key stakeholders, partners and other stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify key stakeholders, partners and other stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key stakeholders, partners and other stakeholders.

pcs.text: Confirm permits and licences required with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm permits and licences required with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm permits and licences required with supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Define and confirm location and setting

elements.title: Determine impact of work on ecosystem and landscape

pcs.text: Inspect location and identify biotic and abiotic elements impacted by planned work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect location and identify biotic and abiotic elements impacted by planned work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect location and identify biotic and abiotic elements impacted by planned work.

pcs.text: Identify and locate communities and species that are subject to legal protection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate communities and species that are subject to legal protection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate communities and species that are subject to legal protection.

pcs.text: Identify biotic and abiotic elements, and ecological functions and processes that vary from plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify biotic and abiotic elements, and ecological functions and processes that vary from plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify biotic and abiotic elements, and ecological functions and processes that vary from plans.

pcs.text: Identify threats to biotic and abiotic elements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify threats to biotic and abiotic elements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify threats to biotic and abiotic elements.

pcs.text: Identify risks of activity/work breaching legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify risks of activity/work breaching legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify risks of activity/work breaching legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Identify risk to ecosystem and landscape elements, functions, processes, and legal obligations, and report concerns to supervisor for direction
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify risk to ecosystem and landscape elements, functions, processes, and legal obligations, and report concerns to supervisor for direction?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify risk to ecosystem and landscape elements, functions, processes, and legal obligations, and report concerns to supervisor for direction.

pcs.text: Record changed conditions and risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record changed conditions and risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record changed conditions and risk.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine impact of work on ecosystem and landscape

elements.title: Determine impact of work on culture and heritage

pcs.text: Identify known cultural and heritage considerations from plans and other documentation, and confirm these with supervisor or cultural advisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify known cultural and heritage considerations from plans and other documentation, and confirm these with supervisor or cultural advisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify known cultural and heritage considerations from plans and other documentation, and confirm these with supervisor or cultural advisor.

pcs.text: Confirm workplace procedure for responding to new cultural and heritage discoveries during work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm workplace procedure for responding to new cultural and heritage discoveries during work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace procedure for responding to new cultural and heritage discoveries during work.

pcs.text: Locate known cultural and heritage features and boundaries in the field
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate known cultural and heritage features and boundaries in the field?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate known cultural and heritage features and boundaries in the field.

pcs.text: Confirm field observations against plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm field observations against plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm field observations against plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify and record potential threat to culture and heritage from work, and report this to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record potential threat to culture and heritage from work, and report this to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record potential threat to culture and heritage from work, and report this to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine impact of work on culture and heritage

elements.title: Determine biosecurity implications of work

pcs.text: Identify biosecurity hazards and threats for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify biosecurity hazards and threats for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify biosecurity hazards and threats for site.

pcs.text: Inspect site and identify and record previously reported biosecurity hazards and threats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site and identify and record previously reported biosecurity hazards and threats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site and identify and record previously reported biosecurity hazards and threats.

pcs.text: Identify and record new or unreported biosecurity threats
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record new or unreported biosecurity threats?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record new or unreported biosecurity threats.

pcs.text: Identify and locate species on site that are subject to legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and locate species on site that are subject to legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and locate species on site that are subject to legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Identify and record actions to mitigate biosecurity risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record actions to mitigate biosecurity risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record actions to mitigate biosecurity risk.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Determine biosecurity implications of work

elements.title: Report identified risks and threats

pcs.text: Compile identified risks and threats according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile identified risks and threats according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile identified risks and threats according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report risks and threats to supervisor for determinations and action
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report risks and threats to supervisor for determinations and action?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report risks and threats to supervisor for determinations and action.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Report identified risks and threats
